architecture_fit.note: K@q is the natural correct retrieval mechanism, minimal attention-only delta from base_model, but no temperature scaling leaves alignment weak (~0.19).

baseline_comparison.note: Relies solely on the framework's built-in uniform baseline; no explicit strawman (no-attention/random) constructed by the attempt.

faithfulness.note: Purely synthetic hand-built fn with no ablation/causal check, and the README never acknowledges this or proposes one.

operating_range.note: Full interference sweep cos 0->1 shows graceful degradation to chance at cos=1, but only the default eval axis is exercised.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: The mechanism is hand-written (K@q) rather than learned, directly demonstrating understanding of the retrieval circuit.

visual_judgement.note: app.py only drops in benchmark_panel with no custom Demo tab; the early alignment.png scatter is not surfaced interactively.

visualisation_rationale.note: README 'Why this visualisation' is thin and partly inaccurate, describing dashboard features (canonical highlight) the app doesn't clearly present.

notes: A minimal, correct hand-built K@q retrieval head that beats the uniform baseline and earns the hardcoded-weights bonus, but the unscaled logits leave alignment weak (~0.19 target mass) and the headline robustness (0.889) is inflated by that flat, low curve. The attempt does little beyond the default evaluation: no custom Demo viz, no strawman comparison, and no faithfulness discussion despite being synthetic. Mean of scored items lands it borderline.
